current_formula_value: raw usable_clmax comes from XFOIL full_alpha_sweep; robust aggregate uses min usable_clmax across successful Re/roughness conditions
notes: Phase 6 tables split clean and rough raw clmax before this min aggregation.

current_formula_value: safe = max(0.10, adjusted_scale*raw - adjusted_delta - tip_3d_penalty); airfoil_observed adjusted_scale=0.92, adjusted_delta=0.04
notes: Config values are safe_clmax_scale=0.90 and safe_clmax_delta=0.05 before airfoil_observed adjustment.

current_formula_value: utilization = cl_target / safe_clmax; pass when utilization <= 0.75
notes: worst_case_margin = case_limit - utilization; hard gate fails when margin < 0.
Clean uses ncrit=9 xtrip=(1,1); rough uses ncrit=5 xtrip=(0.05,0.05).
Root/mid target CL pushes alpha_max to the 18 deg cap; clmax_is_lower_bound flags are reported.

current_formula_value: XFOIL cl_samples are unique zone cl_target values rounded to 0.01; Re is a weighted representative zone Reynolds rounded to 5000
notes: Station Re min/max are retained in the requirement table but not queried one-by-one.
